name: Orell Fussli AG
summary: Orell F√É¬ºssli AG, together with its subsidiaries, engages in security printing, industrial systems, publishing house, and bookstores business in Switzerland and internationally. It produces and protects banknotes, and security and identity documents; offers printing systems, bar codes, and quality control systems, as well as software solutions for serialized products; and publishes children and non-fiction books. The company also sells books and related products in various bookstores in German-speaking Switzerland, as well as through e-commerce. In addition, it provides logistics and other services for libraries and businesses; and serialization solutions. The company was formerly known as Orell F√É¬ºssli Holding AG. Orell F√É¬ºssli AG was founded in 1519 and is headquartered in Z√É¬ºrich, Switzerland.
